ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the post was made */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was made */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the post */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URLs of any media (images, videos) attached to the post */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post contains sensitive content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts the user has made */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being engaged with */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the post has received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the post has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on all engagement metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Trend score indicating how popular the hashtag is */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used in a post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-hashtag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used in posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_hashtags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_keywords" TEXT /* Key words or phrases that contributed to the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the post */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the post */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the post */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
